selections.name: The Heir
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 3rd, 2nd, and 3rd in recent starts. Drops slightly in class and looks ready to break through.

selections.name: Prestige Hall
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door with back-to-back runner-up finishes before a slight miss last start. Can bounce back.

selections.name: Packing King
selections.reason: Resuming from a break but has trialed well. Capable of a strong fresh performance.

selections.name: Lucrative Eight
selections.reason: Solid 3rd on debut and draws the inside rail. Natural improvement expected.

danger_horse.name: Matzden
danger_horse.reason: Dropping in class and gets a favorable inside draw. Could surprise at odds.

selections.name: Big Return
selections.reason: Coming off a strong win over this distance last start. Draws well and can repeat.

selections.name: Circuit Marshal
selections.reason: Narrowly missed last start when 2nd over 1m. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the ability.

selections.name: Amazing Award
selections.reason: Consistent recent form with a couple of 4ths and a 2nd. Maps well from barrier 5.

selections.name: Jolly Brilliant
selections.reason: Finished 3rd last start and has been making headway. A genuine contender.

danger_horse.name: Turin Champions
danger_horse.reason: Won 4 starts back and gets a good draw. Capable of a strong late run.

selections.name: Absolute Heart
selections.reason: Impressive debut winner. Draws the rail and looks poised to remain undefeated.

selections.name: Mr Incredible
selections.reason: Also a debut winner. Maps perfectly from barrier 2 and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Better And Better
selections.reason: Broke his maiden last start with a strong win. Can measure up in this class.

selections.name: Solid Car
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but showed good form last preparation. Drawn well.

danger_horse.name: Hayday
danger_horse.reason: Consistent performer but has a tricky wide draw to overcome.

selections.name: Ace
selections.reason: Won well last start over this distance. Wide draw is a challenge but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: King Dance
selections.reason: Coming off a narrow win over 7f. Draws well and should get a good run.

selections.name: Robot Star
selections.reason: Very consistent with two 2nds and a 5th recently. Will be in the mix.

selections.name: Nyx Gluck
selections.reason: Solid 4th last start and has been racing competitively. Can feature in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Star Mac
danger_horse.reason: Resuming from a break. Has class and could run a big race fresh.

selections.name: Ka Ying Rising
selections.reason: Dominant sprinter on a 19-race win streak. The clear one to beat.

selections.name: Satono Reve
selections.reason: Top-class Japanese raider coming off a G1 win. The main danger to the favorite.

selections.name: Helios Express
selections.reason: Consistently finishes behind Ka Ying Rising. A solid place prospect.

selections.name: Fast Network
selections.reason: Good 5th in a G2 last start and draws well to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Beauty Waves
danger_horse.reason: Capable of running into the placings on his best form.

selections.name: Cool Boy
selections.reason: In excellent form with two wins from his last three starts. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Geneva
selections.reason: Very consistent with a win and two placings recently. Will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Lifeline Express
selections.reason: Draws perfectly in barrier 2 and has been racing well. A strong contender.

selections.name: Pegas
selections.reason: Has been running fair races and can sneak into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Circuit Grand Slam
danger_horse.reason: Dropping back in trip and gets a good draw. Could improve sharply.

selections.name: Jantar Mantar
selections.reason: Elite Japanese miler with exceptional form. Looks very hard to beat.

selections.name: Lucky Sweynesse
selections.reason: Champion local horse coming off a G2 win. Will be right there.

selections.name: Voyage Bubble
selections.reason: Classy miler who was 3rd in a G2 last start. Wide draw but has the quality.

selections.name: My Wish
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten in a G2 last start. A strong place chance.

danger_horse.name: Docklands
danger_horse.reason: European raider who draws the rail. Could surprise if he adapts to the track.

selections.name: Fit For Beauty
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and won the start prior. The one to beat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Aeroinvincible
selections.reason: In great form with two wins and a second recently. Draws perfectly.

selections.name: Mighty Commander
selections.reason: Has been running solid races and gets a good draw to feature.

selections.name: Helene Supafeeling
selections.reason: Has the inside rail and can improve on recent efforts.

danger_horse.name: The Red Hare
danger_horse.reason: Consistent placegetter who can run into the money again.

selections.name: Romantic Warrior
selections.reason: Champion Hong Kong horse coming off a G1 win. The clear top pick.

selections.name: Masquerade Ball
selections.reason: Top-class Japanese raider with excellent form. The main threat.

selections.name: Sosie
selections.reason: Elite French horse who won the HK Vase. Draws well and will be strong late.

selections.name: Royal Champion
selections.reason: European raider who draws the rail and has solid international form.

danger_horse.name: June Take
danger_horse.reason: Another strong Japanese raider who could feature in the finish.

selections.name: The Golden Knight
selections.reason: Won two in a row before a fair 6th last start. Can bounce back here.

selections.name: Shamus Storm
selections.reason: Won three starts back and draws well. Capable of a strong showing.

selections.name: Lucky Sam Gor
selections.reason: Has been running decent races and maps to get a good run.

selections.name: Endued
selections.reason: Consistent form with a win and a second recently. Will be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Lovero
danger_horse.reason: Has been placing consistently and can figure despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Salon S
selections.reason: Undefeated in recent starts and looks very hard to beat from a good draw.

selections.name: Winning Ovation
selections.reason: In excellent form with two wins and a second. Draws perfectly.

selections.name: Mighty Masts
selections.reason: Won well last start and can measure up in this tougher grade.

selections.name: Emblazon
selections.reason: Has won two of his last three but has a terrible draw to overcome.

danger_horse.name: Packing Hermod
danger_horse.reason: Classy horse resuming but has a wide draw and big weight.
